codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly enforces Pro tier gating for password protection and webhooks. The code adds tier checks in handleCreateShare (lines 102-123) to reject password and webhook_url for free users with 403 UPGRADE_REQUIRED. handleCreateSpike (lines 186-215) now checks owner tier before firing webhooks. All 11 new tests pass, covering free user rejection, Pro user success, webhook firing behavior, and combined scenarios. Existing tests were appropriately updated to create Pro users where password/webhook features are needed.

summary: Pro feature gating implementation is complete and correct. Free users receive clear 403 UPGRADE_REQUIRED errors when attempting to use Pro features. Webhooks silently don't fire for free shares. Test coverage is comprehensive with 11 new tests plus updates to 4 existing test files. No issues found.
